title: Ubiquiti Duplexer for airFiber 11-L, Low Band (AF-11-DUP-L)
description: AF-11FX-DUP-L is a frequency duplexer for 2x2 MIMO usage with airFiber 11FX-L unit. Duplexer operates in the frequency band 10.700 - 10955MHz (low channel) a 11.200 - 11.445GHz (high channel)
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Connectors N female - (2) SMA male
